author: ec2-user
text: Changed SCHC disposition after independent gate failure. Applied profile/vector as 45b7b49c+d1ec4bad for review, then excluded them with auditable reverts 8c015b41+74539168. P0 project-LICHEN-r2jc establishes receiver retry vector contradicts RFC 8724 ACK-then-increment ordering, so canonical fixture is not a valid oracle. Also filed vsiw, aezq, f9x1, 8m8p, ojzg, 287m, vexl. Conditional migrations 251e43fb, e54f5320, 159bf0dc are BLOCKED and not applied. Conditional CI commit c748f613 is BLOCKED because authoritative gates cannot all pass (invalid SCHC oracle, MeshCore identity project-LICHEN-u65i, secure-RPL composition project-LICHEN-6uyi).
